Phase-16.NAME: KrotPN → KrotPN Rebranding
Phase-16.purpose: Rename every user-facing and operational reference from KrotPN/krtpn to KrotPN/krtpn across the entire project while guaranteeing zero deploy breakage. This includes container names, script paths, config values, doc metadata, frontend strings, and systemd unit names. Code structure (Python modules, frontend components, DB schema) remains unchanged.

scope.in: All files containing "KrotPN", "krtpn", or "krtpn-" in content or names
scope.out: Python import paths, frontend component names, DB table names, AWG interface names
IP addresses, ports, SSL certs, YooKassa/Telegram tokens

safety-constraints.constraint: Atomic rename on server: stop containers → rename dirs → update configs → start
Deploy idempotency: scripts check for BOTH old and new directory names
Rollback: full backup before rename, restore from backup if deploy fails
DB name stays "krtpn" initially — rename in a later phase if desired

Phase-16.step-1: docker-compose.yml: rename all container names, network, env defaults krtpn-db → krtpn-db, krtpn-redis → krtpn-redis, krtpn-backend → krtpn-backend, krtpn-frontend → krtpn-frontend, krtpn-admin → krtpn-admin, krtpn-nginx → krtpn-nginx, krtpn-network → krtpn-network, DB_USER default krtpn → krtpn, DB_NAME default krtpn → krtpn
Phase-16.step-2: Deploy scripts: update /opt/KrotPN → /opt/KrotPN, all systemd unit names krtpn-routing → krtpn-routing, krtpn-ru-ips → krtpn-ru-ips, krtpn-sync-awg0 → krtpn-sync-awg0, krtpn_deploy.conf → krtpn_deploy.conf, sysctl 99-krtpn.conf → 99-krtpn.conf
Phase-16.step-3: Backend config: app_name "KrotPN" → "KrotPN", default DB URL, frontend_url krtpn.db → krtpn.db, https://krtpn.com → https://krtpn.com, local.krtpn → local.krtpn, noreply@krtpn.com → noreply@krtpn.com, krtpn-cli → krtpn-cli
Phase-16.step-4: Dockerfiles: LABEL maintainer, descriptions backend/Dockerfile: "KrotPN" → "KrotPN", user krtpn → krtpn telegram-bot/Dockerfile: maintainer "KrotPN Telegram Bot" → "KrotPN Telegram Bot" nginx/generate-certs.sh: /opt/KrotPN → /opt/KrotPN, cert O=KrotPN → O=KrotPN
Phase-16.step-5: MyGRACE docs: ALL 28 module files, 3 indexes, 15 phase files, verification files PROJECT="KrotPN" → PROJECT="KrotPN" in all index headers All references in requirements.xml, technology.xml, decisions.xml, operational-packets.xml All archive/classic-grace/*.xml references (historical — update or annotate)
Phase-16.step-6: AGENTS.md: project name, all example paths and commands README.md: all headings, URLs, commands, container names QUICKSTART.md: all headings, URLs, paths, commands DEPLOYMENT_GUIDE.md: all headings, paths, commands, examples mygrace.toml: name = "KrotPN" (optional — project identity) CHANGELOG.md: add rebranding entry, keep historical references
Phase-16.step-7: Frontend i18n and UI strings frontend/src/i18n/index.ts: appName 'KrotPN' → 'KrotPN' frontend-admin/src/i18n/index.ts: appName 'KrotPN' → 'KrotPN' frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx: "KrotPN Secure Access" → "KrotPN Secure Access" frontend-admin/src/pages/Login.tsx: "KrotPN Control Plane" → "KrotPN Control Plane" frontend-admin/src/components/Layout.tsx: sidebar "KrotPN" → "KrotPN" frontend/index.html: title, description meta frontend-admin/index.html: title frontend/vite.config.ts: PWA name, short_name
Phase-16.step-8: package.json files: name, description frontend/package.json: "krtpn-frontend" → "krtpn-frontend" frontend-admin/package.json: "krtpn-admin" → "krtpn-admin" frontend/package-lock.json, frontend-admin/package-lock.json — regenerated after package.json edit backend/pyproject.toml: name "krtpn" → "krtpn", description
Phase-16.step-9: Telegram bot: bot description in bot.py (if any hardcoded strings) backend/app/billing/service.py: payment description "KrotPN" → "KrotPN" backend/app/vpn/router.py: config filename krtpn-{id}.conf → krtpn-{id}.conf frontend/src/pages/Config.tsx: config filename krtpn-*.conf → krtpn-*.conf
Phase-16.step-10: Nginx config and operational paths deploy/nginx/default — if references KrotPN in headers/comments nginx/generate-certs.sh: all /opt/krtpn → /opt/krtpn paths .env.example: APP_NAME, DATABASE_URL, ADMIN_EMAIL, EMAIL_FROM defaults
Phase-16.step-11: Git remote and repository references Update all github.com/anyagixx/KrotPN* URLs to new repo URL install.sh: clone URL, checkout path deploy/deploy-all.sh: clone URL, cd path
Phase-16.step-12: Live deploy verification on VPS 1. Full backup: tar czf /tmp/krtpn-backup-$(date +%Y%m%d).tar.gz /opt/KrotPN 2. Stop all containers: docker compose -f /opt/KrotPN/docker-compose.yml down 3. Rename directory: mv /opt/KrotPN /opt/KrotPN 4. Create backward-compat symlink: ln -s /opt/KrotPN /opt/KrotPN 5. Update all config files in /opt/KrotPN (this phase changes) 6. Stop and rename systemd units: disable old, enable new 7. Start: docker compose -f /opt/KrotPN/docker-compose.yml up -d 8. Verify: all containers running, health checks passing 9. Test VPN connection, routing, admin panel, billing webhook

phase-gates.gate-1: All static files pass grep: zero remaining "KrotPN"/"krtpn" in source (except archive and CHANGELOG)
phase-gates.gate-2: docker compose config validates with new names
phase-gates.gate-3: bash -n passes on all deploy scripts
phase-gates.gate-5: Live deploy on VPS: all 6 containers healthy with krtpn-* names
phase-gates.gate-6: VPN client connects with krtpn-*.conf, split-tunneling works
